title: 'Every person saved is a miracle': Families call to trapped loved ones in region devastated by Venezuela quakes
description: Families keep vigil at buildings where they fear their loved ones are trapped, but face an impossible task to move heavy debris.
content:
Bare hands and shovels shift through the rubble, while a drone scans overhead. Every moment, every action matters. It is a race against time to find survivors.

title: Amber heat warning extended until Sunday for the South East
description: The onset of cooler air will end a spell of record-breaking heat which caused widespread disruption.
content:
A Met Office amber warning for extreme heat in south east England has been extended until 09:00 BST on Sunday.
Ending a run of record-breaking heat, the weather service says cooler air is set to arrive by the second half of the weekend in the west, b... [385 chars]

title: Man arrested on suspicion of attempted murder after car hits pedestrians in west London
description: Police said the car involved did not stop at the scene, but was stopped nearby, and the driver was arrested. | ITV National News
content:
A man has been arrested on suspicion of attempted murder after a car collided with multiple pedestrians in west London before driving away, police have said.

title: Hezbollah rejects Israel-Lebanon agreement as Israeli attacks hit south
description: Israeli strike kills one in southern Lebanon as many view latest agreement with Israel as a ‘surrender of sovereignty’.
content:
Hezbollah leader Naim Qassem has rejected the framework agreement signed by Lebanon and Israel in Washington DC, calling it “humiliating, shameful and a surrender of sovereignty” for Beirut.

title: Three injured in Ealing after car ‘drives into pedestrians’
description: Paramedics rush one patient to major trauma centre after incident at Ealing Broadway
content:
Three people have been taken to hospital after a car reportedly drove into pedestrians at Ealing Broadway on Saturday afternoon.
